message:
chore(deps): bump asupersync 0.2 → 0.3 (crates.io v0.3.0)

Picks up the v0.3.0 release (2500+ commits since 0.2.9, published to
crates.io on 2026-04-21). Brings in the coordinated dependency wave
(digest-0.11 / sha1 / sha2 / hmac / signal-hook / rayon), three real
production concurrency fixes, and a large test-compile hygiene pass —
all of which matter directly for a mid-layer like fastmcp that threads
asupersync::Cx through its tool-dispatch loop and request-timeout
plumbing.

- Cargo.toml: `asupersync = "0.2"` → `asupersync = "0.3"` in
  [workspace.dependencies]. The `rich_rust` sibling stays at "0.2" —
  unrelated to the asupersync release and should bump independently
  when its own next version ships.
- Cargo.lock: resolved via `cargo update -p asupersync`. Advances
  asupersync to 0.3.0 plus its transitive refresh (sha2 0.11 added,
  signal-hook 0.4.4).
